scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "bun --watch backend/src/index.ts" "pnpm --filter hacker-use-frontend dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "bun backend/src/index.ts" "pnpm --filter hacker-use-frontend preview"
scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p backend/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter hacker-use-frontend exec tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit
